⚠ WARNING: Stimulant-tDCS pharmacological interaction — limited systematic study
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in ADHD — no published RCT; mechanism-based rationale only
⚠ WARNING: tDCS dose optimization (intensity, duration, sessions) for ADHD — no dose-finding study
⚠ WARNING: No adequately powered sham-controlled RCT of tDCS specifically for DSM-5 GAD
⚠ WARNING: Long-term maintenance effects beyond treatment block
⚠ WARNING: TPS in GAD — no published data
⚠ WARNING: No adequately powered RCT of tDCS in ASD — all evidence is pilot/feasibility level
⚠ WARNING: Optimal tDCS target for ASD (DLPFC vs TPJ vs other) — no comparative data
⚠ WARNING: Long-term effects and safety in neurodevelopmental populations — entirely unknown
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in ASD — no published data
⚠ WARNING: Age-specific protocols (child vs adolescent vs adult ASD) — no established guidelines
⚠ WARNING: Long-term pain relief beyond treatment block — limited follow-up data (>3 months)
⚠ WARNING: Head-to-head comparison of M1 vs DLPFC vs combined montages for fibromyalgia
⚠ WARNING: Optimal session parameters (number, frequency, intensity) for chronic pain
⚠ WARNING: taVNS for chronic pain — no dedicated fibromyalgia RCT
⚠ WARNING: Long-term maintenance effects beyond 3 months post-treatment block — limited data
⚠ WARNING: tDCS in TRD — dedicated adequately powered RCT needed (existing data underpowered)
⚠ WARNING: TPS in MDD — no published RCT; urgent need for controlled trial
⚠ WARNING: Optimal combination strategy (tDCS + taVNS vs tDCS + CES) — head-to-head data absent
⚠ WARNING: Home-based slow-oscillation tDCS delivery without real-time EEG feedback
⚠ WARNING: Phase-coupled tDCS for insomnia in clinical (non-laboratory) settings
⚠ WARNING: Predictive biomarkers of CES response in insomnia (EEG phenotype, autonomic profile)
⚠ WARNING: taVNS randomised controlled trials specifically for insomnia disorder
⚠ WARNING: Paediatric and adolescent insomnia neurostimulation evidence is essentially absent
⚠ WARNING: Most evidence from case series — selection bias and absence of control conditions
⚠ WARNING: Long-term outcomes and safety in long COVID population — entirely unknown
⚠ WARNING: Optimal dose and frequency in PEM-prone patients — risk of symptom exacerbation
⚠ WARNING: taVNS for long COVID dysautonomia/POTS — no published controlled data
⚠ WARNING: No large multi-site tDCS RCT for MS with validated primary cognitive or motor endpoint
⚠ WARNING: Optimal tDCS protocol for progressive MS (SPMS/PPMS) — limited data
⚠ WARNING: taVNS for MS fatigue — investigational, no published RCT
⚠ WARNING: Long-term maintenance of tDCS effects in MS — limited follow-up data
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in OCD — no published RCT
⚠ WARNING: Long-term OCD symptom maintenance after tDCS — limited follow-up data
⚠ WARNING: Long-term maintenance effects of neuromodulation in PD beyond 3 months — limited data
⚠ WARNING: TPS in advanced PD (H&Y 4-5) — insufficient trial data
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in PD: emerging pilot data only — no adequately powered RCT completed
⚠ WARNING: No adequately powered dedicated tDCS RCT for PTSD with PCL-5 as primary endpoint
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in PTSD — no published RCT; translational evidence from animal models only
⚠ WARNING: Combined neuromodulation + psychotherapy vs psychotherapy alone — no controlled trial
⚠ WARNING: Complex PTSD (cPTSD) — no dedicated neuromodulation study
⚠ WARNING: TPS for stroke motor rehabilitation — very limited published data
⚠ WARNING: Post-stroke depression tDCS — dedicated adequately powered RCT needed
⚠ WARNING: Predictors of tDCS response in stroke — CST integrity, lesion volume, chronicity
⚠ WARNING: Optimal timing of neuromodulation post-TBI — early vs late intervention window
⚠ WARNING: Stimulation parameters for TBI — altered threshold due to neurometabolic dysfunction
⚠ WARNING: taVNS in TBI — no published RCT; mechanism-based rationale only
⚠ WARNING: TPS in TBI — no published controlled data
⚠ WARNING: Inconsistent electrode placement findings — optimal montage not definitively established
⚠ WARNING: Long-term tinnitus relief after treatment block — limited follow-up data
⚠ WARNING: taVNS for tinnitus — limited published data
⚠ WARNING: Combined tDCS + psychoacoustic training (notched music therapy) — no controlled trial
